title: VendorA Ships New Agent Harness With Guardrails
summary_normalized: vendor a announced a new version of its agent harness that adds built in guardrails for safer autonomous execution across popular coding assistants
change_class_rationale: New guardrail configuration surface on an existing harness; not a new capability class.

title: VendorA Launches New Agent Harness Featuring Guardrails

title: VendorA Rolls Out New Agent Harness With Guardrails

title: VendorA Adds New Guardrails To Agent Harness
summary_normalized: industry watchers note that vendor a s harness update focuses heavily on guardrail policy configuration for enterprise deployments and audit logging
change_class_rationale: Trade-press relay of the vendor announcement with added commentary.

title: VendorB Unveils Next-Gen Computer-Use Agent
summary_normalized: vendor b unveiled a flashy new computer use agent product with no independent benchmarks or third party validation available at launch
change_class_rationale: A new product announcement with no independent validation available.

title: Core Project Spec: Breaking Change To Tool Call Framing
summary_normalized: the core project spec now requires a new tool call framing for every agent cli and mcp integration existing integrations must migrate before the next release
change_class_rationale: Existing tool call framing stops working; every integration must migrate.

title: VendorC Deprecates Legacy Harness Plugin API
summary_normalized: vendor c quietly published a deprecation notice for its legacy harness plugin api with a firm removal date and no independent coverage of the change
change_class_rationale: The legacy plugin API will stop working on the stated removal date.

title: Independent Benchmark Study Measures VendorA Harness Reliability
summary_normalized: an independent research collective ran a reproducible benchmark suite against vendor a s harness and published full methodology and raw results
change_class_rationale: New independently measured reliability characteristics for an existing harness.

title: Independent Analysis Of VendorA Ships New Agent Harness Guardrails
summary_normalized: an independent analyst reviewed vendor a s new guardrail feature line by line and found the claims broadly accurate with a few caveats around policy overrides
change_class_rationale: Independent corroboration of the vendor's own guardrail announcement.

title: Why Guardrail Bypass Attacks Are The Next Harness Security Problem
